mapper.insert: INSERT INTO regularization_application (employee_id, formal_salary, probation_summary, supervisor_comment, status, submitter_id) VALUES (#{employeeId}, #{formalSalary}, #{probationSummary}, #{supervisorComment}, #{status}, #{submitterId})
mapper.select: SELECT ra.*, e.name AS employee_name, e.dept_id, d.dept_name, p.position_name, e.entry_date AS hire_date, e.regular_date AS probation_end_date, su.username AS submitter_name FROM regularization_application ra JOIN employee e ON ra.employee_id = e.id LEFT JOIN department d ON e.dept_id = d.id LEFT JOIN position p ON e.position_id = p.id LEFT JOIN sys_user su ON ra.submitter_id = su.id WHERE ra.id = #{id}
